summary.what: Stale anchor no longer blocks hooks or confuses agents
summary.why: Stale anchors after squash-merge caused pending to dump all reachable commits and HasPendingCommits to error, blocking hooks — graceful degradation chosen over hard errors
summary.how: pending returns 0 actionable commits with guidance on stale anchor; HasPendingCommits returns false not error; doctor gains merge-strategy and stale-anchor checks
